title: Cost And Latency Budget Packet Briefing
summary: Run data, finance guidance, and user feedback about trace depth, retries, and demo responsiveness. Briefing focus: Recommend how much tracing and retry behavior to keep for the next demo run.

claims.text: Run telemetry: The candidate prompt reduced unsupported claims but increased median token usage by 11%.
Finance guidance: Finance approved up to a 1.15x cost ratio for demo-quality eval runs if the report shows why extra tokens reduce review time.
Reviewer feedback: Reviewers said long traces are useful only when they are summarized next to the claim that failed.

openQuestions: Confirm whether demo rehearsal has newer follow-up data.
Confirm whether retry policy draft has newer follow-up data.
recommendation: Use this as a fast first pass, then inspect source tension and citation support in the lab before treating the recommendation as shippable.
